channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prescott throws TD pass to Tolbert with 20 seconds left to lift Cowboys past Steelers, 20-17
item.description: Dak Prescott hit Jalen Tolbert with a 4-yard touchdown with 20 seconds remaining and the Dallas Cowboys slipped past the Pittsburgh Steelers 20-17 early Monday The Cowboys (3-2) won their second straight after Prescott overcame a mistake-filled night to lead a 70-yard drive that ended with Prescott
item.dc:creator: Will Graves, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dak Prescott engineers clutch touchdown drive to give Cowboys win over Steelers
item.description: Into the wee hours of Monday morning, Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott delivered a game-winning touchdown drive and helped beat the Pittsburgh Steelers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodger Stadium fans toss balls and trash on field, interrupt Padres' 10-2 win that evens NLDS
item.description: Fans threw baseballs in the direction of San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar and then tossed trash that caused a lengthy delay before the Padres beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 10-2 and to even their NL Division Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Nick Castellanos ripped a winning two-out single off Tylor Megill that scored Trea Turner and sent the Philadelphia Phillies to a dizzying 7-6 win over the New York Mets and evened the NL Division Series at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: WWE star Drew McIntyre reveals massive laceration on head after bloody Hell in a Cell match
item.description: CM Punk defeated Drew McIntyre in their Hell in a Cell match on Saturday night at Bad Blood. McIntyre needed staples in his head afterward.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Phillies bench slumping third baseman Alec Bohm in Game 2 of the NLDS
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Looking for any kind of jolt for a slumping offense, the Philadelphia Phillies benched All-Star third baseman Alec Bohm for Game 2 of the NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Browns' Deshaun Watson leaves coach flabbergasted during crucial 4th down in loss vs Commanders
item.description: Cleveland Browns quarterback Deshaun Watson left head coach Kevin Stefanski disappointed after he decided to walk toward the sideline on 4th-and-goal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coco Gauff wins China Open final in straight sets, Sinner and Alcaraz advance in Shanghai
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — Coco Gauff won her second title this season with a lopsided 6-1, 6-3 victory over Karolina Muchova in the final of the China Open on Sunday. Aged 20, the sixth-ranked U.S. player became the youngest China Open champion in 14 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings hold off Rodgers and the Jets for 23-17 win in London to improve to 5-0
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Aaron Rodgers had a message for Andrew Van Ginkel after the Vikings linebacker returned an interception 63 yards for a touchdown. “He told me, too, ‘Christmas came early’ for me,” the humble Van Ginkel said. “I just told him ‘thank you.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ten Hag future up in the air after Man United draws at Villa. Tottenham collapses in 3-2 loss
item.description: For Erik ten Hag, it's very simple. “We are all on board, together, on one page,” the Manchester United manager said of his relationship with the club’s leadership after a 0-0 draw at Aston Villa in the Premier League on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers pregame: Kittle, Warner active vs. Cardinals; McCaffrey on mend
item.description: While Christian McCaffrey is making encouraging strides with his Achilles issues, the 49ers will suit up injured stars George Kittle and Fred Warner in today's game against the Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Vikings stave off Jets' 4th-quarter comeback attempt to remain undefeated in London
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings offense didn't have its best performance, but their defense stepped up to stave off a comeback by the New York Jets to remain undefeated in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets kicker's pre-game warmups interrupted by Vikings cheerleaders in hilarious scene
item.description: New York Jets kicker Greg Zuerlein had to wait for the right moment to kick pre-game field goals, as the Minnesota Vikings cheerleaders performed right in the middle of where he kicked.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taylor Swift not among Travis Kelce's friends and family at tight end's birthday charity event
item.description: Travis Kelce's 35th birthday saw his annual Car Jam charity event in Kansas City take place, and while there were friends and family galore, there was no Taylor Swift sighting.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Simone Biles risks Bears fans' backlash again after saying Packers star among most impressive NFL players
item.description: Simone Biles may have irked Chicago Bears fans again after shouting out Green Bay Packers quarterback Jordan Love during a podcast appearance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Packers suspend Romeo Doubs after WR skipped two practices leading up to game against Rams
item.description: The wide receiver is widely expected to rejoin the Green Bay Packers next week after he serves a one-game suspension due to what was deemed as conduct detrimental to the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox UPDATE: The Bears announced their list of inactives, via their X feed. They are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Zacch Pickens, DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominique Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ohtani homers in playoff debut and the Dodgers rally to beat the Padres 7-5 in NLDS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani hit a three-run homer in his postseason debut, Teoscar Hernández’s two-run single gave Los Angeles its first lead in a playoff game in two years, and the Dodgers beat the San Diego Padres 7-5 in their NL Division Series opener Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres fandom in full force at first of three postseason watch parties
item.description: The Padres' quest for postseason glory continues and fans are along for the thrilling journey. Despite Saturday night's game being held in Los Angeles at Dodgers Stadium, the first of three watch parties kicked off with a packed house at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Washington pulls away in 4th quarter to beat No. 10 Michigan 27-17 in title game rematch
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Washington quarterback Will Rogers watched the final seconds tick away and wondered if the field at Husky Stadium was about to be flooded with purple.
item.dc:creator: TIM BOOTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Clayton Kershaw won't pitch for the Dodgers in playoffs after big toe injury fails to heal
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Clayton Kershaw, sidelined since late August with a toe injury, won’t pitch again this season for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Mets advance in playoffs with 4-2 win over Brewers
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Pete Alonso hit a go-ahead, three-run homer off All-Star closer Devin Williams in the ninth inning and the New York Mets beat the Milwaukee Brewers 4-2 on Thursday night to win their NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Caitlin Clark officially named WNBA Rookie of the Year
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11)— Caitlin Clark was officially named the WNBA Rookie of the Year on Thursday, and rightfully so. Clark averaged 19.2 points, 8.4 assists, and 5.7 rebounds per game. The Indiana Fever finished 20 and 20 on the year and made the playoffs for the first time in eight seasons.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Backlash over San Jose State University transgender volleyball player 'isn't about sports,' advocates say
item.description: (KRON) -- Four teams forfeited matches against the San Jose State University women's volleyball team since a lawsuit was filed on behalf of several NCAA athletes, including SJSU's team captain. According to the lawsuit filed on September 23, one of SJSU's volleyball players is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Utah State Volleyball cancels match against San Jose State, becomes fourth team to do so
item.description: The Utah State women's volleyball team has canceled their Oct. 23 match against San Jose State becoming the fourth team this year to do so, according to reports and tweets from state officials. This comes amid a swirling controversy over a SJSU player's gender.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Mahon, ABC 4

item.title: Lightning prospects fight for roster spots ahead of Panthers preseason matchup
item.description: Preseason means players fighting for a roster spot get a chance to impress coaches. Center Conor Geekie is one of those players who head coach Jon Cooper thinks highly of.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears' rookie Tory Taylor named NFC Player of the Week
item.description: Tory Taylor of the Chicago Bears was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for his performance in the team's victory over the Los Angeles Rams, with a 55.4-yard average and three punts landing inside the 10-yard line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: From food to murder, Aaron Rodgers talks all things Berkeley ahead of College GameDay appearance
item.description: (KRON) -- The college football world will have its eyes on Berkeley this weekend as Cal hosts ESPN's famous College GameDay show for the first time before its game against No. 8 Miami on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Are professional athletes playing too many games?
item.description: Fans, athletes and medical experts have been having discussions on the increasing demand for players starting from the time they first start playing, all the way up to the professional ranks.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies face another tough challenge at #21 Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Aggies have had two weeks to stew in that second half collapse at Temple when they got outscored in the second half 28-8 to fall to 1-3 on the season. "Obviously, our record is not what we want," said quarterback Spencer Petras on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: Lightning and thunder combo could bode well for Bears' offense
item.description: The Chicago Bears have developed a formidable 1-2 punch in running backs D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson, who have shown the ability to both smash and slice through defenses, but the success of the offense depends on the performance of the offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Giants fire Farhan Zaidi, Buster Posey named as replacement
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants have parted ways with President of Baseball Operations Farhan Zaidi and named Buster Posey as his replacement.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Basketball Hall of Famer Dikembe Mutombo dies at 58
item.description: Mutombo starred in the NBA for 18 seasons and is considered to be one of the greatest defensive players in the history of the sport.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WFLA, NBC
